title: Digimon Masters Online

notes: I reported that it crashed after clicking the play button, but after closing several of the mostly unreadable error windows, it starts to load the game, pausing to spit several error boxes at me periodically until it finally gave me a connection error message and "translation needed", and then fully crashing.
